title: micranthes forbesii
intro: Micranthes forbesii, also known as Forbes' saxifrage, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic. The plant's roots and leaves have been used to treat various health issues, such as kidney problems, digestive disorders, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Micranthes forbesii can be made by infusing its roots and leaves in hot water or using them in tincture form to reap its medicinal benefits.
